input[data-task=\"-\"]::after.mask-image: url("data:image/svg+xml,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 16 16' width='1em' height='1em'><path fill='currentColor' d='M4 8a.5.5 0 0 1 .5-.5h7a.5.5 0 0 1 0 1h-7A.5.5 0 0 1 4 8'/></svg>")

input[data-task=\"R\"]::after.mask-image: url("data:image/svg+xml,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 24 24' width='24' height='24'><path fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round' stroke-width='2' d='M7 20V4h5.5a4 4 0 0 1 0 9H7m5 0l5 7'/></svg>")
